creator: haraldei-freebsdbugz@anduin.net
text:
(In reply to Dag-Erling Smørgrav from comment #4)
> That's what patches are for.

Yep. But that should probably be in place either before this change set, or as part of it. I can help, but it will probably be a bit of work to do it for all versions. That still leaves the `/proc` part, though. Which I don't yet know enough about to know how important it is.
